sections.headline: Your problem doesn't fit the standard mould? Good.
sections.subheadline:
Some cold chain problems don't come with an off-the-shelf answer. A new product format, an unusual location, a compliance requirement nobody has solved before, a supply chain that needs redesigning from scratch.
These are the problems Crystal is built for.

items.title: Cold chain consulting
items.description: We audit your existing cold chain, identify gaps, and design a solution: whether that means new infrastructure, better processes, or a different technology.

items.title: Bespoke cold chain design
items.description: A cold chain designed around your exact product, your exact route, and your exact compliance requirement. Not a template. A solution.

items.title: Overflow & emergency capacity
items.description: Cold chain failure doesn't wait for convenient timing. Crystal can deploy portable cold storage and transport capacity at short notice, anywhere in India.

items.title: New market entry
items.description: Entering a new city or a new product category? Crystal helps you design and deploy the cold chain infrastructure you need before you launch.

steps.title: Tell us your problem
steps.description: Share your requirement in as much or as little detail as you have. No brief is too vague.

steps.title: Solution design
steps.description: Crystal's team assesses your requirement and returns with a solution design: infrastructure, operations, and commercial model.

steps.title: Build & deploy
steps.description: We build it, deploy it, and stand behind it. One partner, full accountability.
